landing.heroSubtitle: Fast, secure, and simple. Experience the future of banking with O-rangeankus. Manage your money, transfer funds globally, and grow your wealth all in one place.
landing.manageFinances: Everything you need to manage your finances seamlessly
landing.wireTransfersDesc: Fast domestic and international wire transfers with competitive rates and real-time tracking. Send money to anyone, anywhere, anytime.
landing.internationalDesc: Send money globally with multi-currency support. Transparent fees and real exchange rates make international banking simple.
landing.directDepositDesc: Set up direct deposit for your salary and get your paycheck faster. Automatic, reliable, and completely secure.
landing.access24_7Desc: Bank whenever you want. Our platform is available around the clock for your convenience. No downtime, no limits.
landing.securityDesc: Your data is protected with military-grade encryption. We comply with all major banking regulations and security standards.
landing.protectionDesc: Your deposits are insured up to the maximum allowed. Peace of mind knowing your money is protected by us.
landing.simpleSteps: Get started in just 3 simple steps
landing.createAccountDesc: Sign up in minutes with just your email and phone number. Quick verification process.
landing.verifyDesc: Complete secure identity verification. Your information stays protected with us.
landing.startBankingDesc: Start transferring money, setting up deposits, and managing your finances instantly.
landing.trustDescription: We take security seriously. O-rangeankus is committed to protecting your financial information with industry-leading security standards.
landing.encryptionDesc: Bank-grade security protects all your data
landing.fdicDesc: Your deposits are insured and protected
landing.supportDesc: Our team is always here to help
landing.fraudDesc: Advanced monitoring catches suspicious activity instantly
landing.joinThousands: Join thousands of satisfied customers using O-rangeankus.

security.title: Security
security.description: Your account information is encrypted and secure. Only share routing and account numbers with trusted employers.

needHelp.title: Need Help?
needHelp.description: Contact our support team if you have questions about direct deposits.

about.title: About Your Statements
about.item1: Statements are generated on the last day of each month
about.item3: Keep statements for tax and record-keeping purposes
about.item4: Statements are available for download for 7 years

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Talk to O-rangeankus Support
contact.description: Have a question or need help with your account? Our support team is available 24/7 to assist with transfers, deposits, account setup, and security.
contact.pickChannel: Pick the channel that works best for you.
contact.reportDescription: If you believe there is suspicious activity on your account, contact us immediately and we will begin an investigation right away.
contact.guidanceDescription: Need help setting up direct deposit, transfers, or security settings? Our experts are here to guide you every step of the way.
contact.feedbackDescription: Your feedback helps us improve O-rangeankus. Share your ideas and we'll use them to make banking simpler and safer.
